reviews.review_description: The only way to play this sitting is to load the game, see where the console is then take a chair to it. When I load the game sitting on my sofa I'm too far away from everything to play. So haven't been able to try the demo.

I can't wait to see the full game in action! Learning about each dinosaur in documentary mode and exploring their habitat really brings them to life. 
Exploring the museum and playing the available arcade games makes me excited for what's to come.
I really enjoy the attention to detail, especially when interacting with objects. It really showcases the effort put into this game!
Definitely worth checking out.

I had a blast trying out this demo of Dinoplanet! The voice acting on the parrot in the documentary mode was great, and I learned some new and interesting dinosaur facts. I also enjoyed checking out the two available arcade games (the basketball one was my favorite), and I can’t wait to play all of the arcade games and see the rest of the documentary portion when the full game is available!

Playing the demo of DinoPlanet was awesome! I can’t wait for the full experience! 

My first stop was the Documentary mode, where a talking parrot teaches you about various time periods and the dinosaurs that lived during them. A petting zoo is also available, where cute cartoon dinosaurs scamper around and you can unlock food to feed them!

Next, I checked out Dinosaurs vs Robots, a tower defense game where you can place solar panels and turrets to defend against rampaging dinosaurs. 
Finally, I played Dinomite Buckets - a spin on the classic basketball arcade game. I was not great at it - but I had a ball!

I loved this experience, and will eagerly be awaiting the full game!
